subject: Re: Can ts_aretomo generate .aln files?
body:
Hi Jesse,
Nothing should be deleted unless you use —delete_intermediate
We use the IMOD alignment output rather than the aln files though as there was already logic in warp for this. Not sure if this replaces aln output or only makes extra files.
Note IMOD output is broken in AreTomo2 and AreTomo3
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jan 20, 2025, at 06:20, Jesse Hansen <bluufive@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿hi,
Presumably ts_aretomo generates .aln files internally in order to generate the xml files contianing the alignments.  Is it somehow possible to have ts_aretomo output the aln file?  
thanks
Jesse
